FFS Q01 you have any other insurance that pays at least some of the cost of your health care? 
Please mark the box below for each type of health insurance that you have. 
ins_medigap FFS Q02A Medigap, which may be identified on the front of your policy as "Medicare Supplemental Insurance" 
Please mark the box below for each type of health insurance that you have. 
ins_employer FFS Q02B Employer, Union, or Retiree Health Coverage (Insurance) 
Please mark the box below for each type of health
